tasks.title: Fix prompts_internal/tests.rs exceeding 1000 LOC
evidence: prompts_internal/tests.rs has 1072 lines, exceeding AGENTS.md 1000 LOC limit
Contains tests for worker prompts, task builder, scan prompts, iteration
Different prompt types should be tested in separate modules
plan: Split into prompts_internal/tests/worker.rs
Split into prompts_internal/tests/task_builder.rs
Split into prompts_internal/tests/scan.rs
Split into prompts_internal/tests/iteration.rs
Update prompts_internal/tests/mod.rs to import submodules
Run make ci to verify all tests pass

tasks.title: Audit error handling patterns for consistency
evidence: Mixed error handling patterns observed: anyhow::Result, thiserror enums, String errors
runner.rs uses RunnerError enum with thiserror
Some functions return Result<T, String> instead of proper error types
No documented error handling strategy in AGENTS.md or docs
plan: Survey current error handling patterns across the codebase
Identify inconsistencies: Result<T, String> vs anyhow::Result vs custom enums
Document preferred patterns for different scenarios
Create error handling style guide in docs/ or AGENTS.md
Create follow-up tasks to refactor inconsistent error handling
Focus on high-impact areas: queue operations, runner execution, git operations

tasks.title: Review public API surface for minimalism
evidence: AGENTS.md: Default visibility is private; pub must be intentional
AGENTS.md: Prefer pub(crate) over pub unless cross-crate use required
Many items marked pub that may only be used within crate
No audit has been done of public API surface area
plan: Analyze all pub items to determine actual usage scope
Identify items that can be pub(crate) instead of pub
Identify items that can be private (module-only)
Check if lib.rs exports are minimal and intentional
Create task list for visibility reductions
Ensure no breaking changes to legitimate external consumers

tasks.title: Implement subtask support for hierarchical task breakdown
evidence: No parent/child relationship fields in Task schema
Large tasks cannot be broken down into trackable subtasks
PRD multi-task mode creates sequential dependencies but not true subtasks
plan: Add `parent_id` field to Task for child-to-parent reference
Add `subtasks` array field or compute dynamically from parent_id
Add `ralph task subtask create <PARENT_ID> <REQUEST>` command
Update parent task progress based on subtask completion percentage
Block parent task completion until all subtasks are done
Update TUI to show collapsible subtask hierarchies
Update queue graph to show parent-child relationships
Add tests for subtask lifecycle and parent completion blocking

tasks.title: Add webhook support for task event notifications
evidence: No webhook configuration in config schema
No outgoing notification system for task events
Only desktop notifications are supported (local machine only)
plan: Add webhook configuration to config schema (URL, events, secret)
Create webhook module for async HTTP POST delivery
Support events: task_created, task_started, task_completed, task_failed
Add retry logic with exponential backoff for failed deliveries
Add webhook signature verification using configured secret
Add `ralph webhook test` command to verify configuration
Document webhook payload format and retry behavior

tasks.title: Add multi-select support to TUI for batch operations
evidence: TUI only supports single task selection with arrow keys
No way to select multiple tasks for batch archive or status change
Command palette has no multi-select actions
plan: Add Space key to toggle task selection in list view
Add visual indicator for selected tasks (checkmark or highlight)
Add `a` key for batch archive of selected tasks
Add `s` key for batch status change with submenu
Add `d` key for batch delete with confirmation
Show selection count in footer when tasks are selected
Add Esc key to clear selection
Update help overlay with multi-select keybindings

tasks.title: Cache prompt expansion regexes
evidence: prompts_internal/util.rs expand_variables constructs Regex::new three times per call
These regexes are static and could be cached to avoid repeated compilation
plan: Move regex construction to static LazyLock/OnceCell values
Update expand_variables to reuse the cached regexes
Add/adjust tests to ensure behavior is unchanged
Run make ci

tasks.title: Centralize magic numbers and constants
evidence: Hardcoded values found: 10MB ANSI buffer (app.rs:682)
10k log line limit (app.rs:696)
4-digit task ID width default
Retry count of 2 for CI failures
No centralized constants module for shared values
plan: Search for hardcoded numeric literals with grep
Identify magic numbers that appear multiple times
Create constants module or add to existing config/contracts
Document what each constant controls
Refactor to use named constants
Run make ci to verify no regressions

tasks.title: Add completion tracking for long-running operations
evidence: TUI has spinner but no progress percentage for long operations
No ETA calculation for multi-step workflows
Phase tracking exists but no overall completion percentage
Users cannot estimate remaining time for task execution
plan: Add progress percentage to ExecutionPhase tracking
Calculate ETA based on historical phase durations
Show progress bar in TUI when phases are configured
Update spinner to include percentage when available
Add tests for progress calculation accuracy

tasks.title: Improve test coverage for edge cases in queue operations
evidence: Batch operations have tests but edge cases may be missing
No tests for concurrent queue modifications
Limited tests for validation edge cases (circular deps, max depth)
Archive operations need more failure mode coverage
plan: Review current test coverage for queue operations
Add tests for: circular dependency detection, max depth exceeded
Add tests for: concurrent modification scenarios
Add tests for: invalid UTF-8 in task fields
Add tests for: queue file corruption handling
Ensure all failure modes have test coverage

tasks.title: Document security considerations for runner execution
evidence: No centralized security documentation for runner execution
Redaction exists but not documented for developers
Safeguard dumps behavior described in README but not in dev docs
No guidance on handling secrets in runner output
plan: Create docs/security.md with runner security considerations

Add security section to runner module docs
Document best practices for handling sensitive data
Review AGENTS.md security section for completeness

tasks.title: Add conditional task execution based on custom conditions
evidence: No conditional execution support in task schema
Cannot skip tasks based on file existence, env vars, or command output
All tasks in queue are attempted regardless of context
plan: Add `condition` field to Task with type and parameters
Support condition types: file_exists, env_set, command_success, task_status
Add `ralph task condition <TASK_ID> <TYPE> <PARAM>` command
Evaluate condition before task execution in run one/loop
Skip task with log message if condition not met
Add `--skip-conditions` flag to bypass condition checks
Add tests for each condition type

tasks.title: Add interactive context init and update wizards
evidence: docs/cli.md shows `--interactive` flag for context init/update as 'not yet implemented'
Context creation requires manual editing of AGENTS.md
No guided wizard for updating specific sections
plan: Implement `ralph context init --interactive` wizard
Guide user through project type selection with descriptions

Implement `ralph context update --interactive`

tasks.title: Add task splitting command to break down large tasks
evidence: No command to split a task into subtasks
Large tasks require manual creation of replacement tasks
No preservation of original task context when breaking down
plan: Add `ralph task split <TASK_ID>` command
Mark original task as split (new status or custom field)
Create child tasks linked via parent_id (depends on subtask feature)
Preserve original scope, evidence, plan in parent task
Distribute plan items across child tasks
Add `--interactive` mode to guide splitting process
Add `--number <N>` to create N empty child tasks
Update docs/cli.md with split examples
